name: Mars Rover Discovery

article.title: Mars Rover Finds Evidence of Ancient Water System
article.description: NASA's latest rover has discovered mineral formations that could only form in the presence of flowing water.

reactions.author: NASAWatch
reactions.text: This is incredible! The mineral formations are unmistakable signs of ancient rivers.

reactions.author: SpaceXEnthusiast
reactions.text: One step closer to colonization. Mars here we come!

reactions.author: Dr_AstroGeology
reactions.text: The data quality from the relay network is exceptional. Great teamwork between agencies.

reactions.author: CosmicCuriosity
reactions.text: This changes our understanding of Mars' history completely.

source.title: Mars Rover Mission Update: Ancient Water System Confirmed
source.author: Dr. Katherine Spiers

speakerNotes: This discovery just came in from the Mars rover
The signal was strong throughout landing - flawless operation
We've been getting incredible data transmission rates
The geological findings are the most significant in years
What does this mean for Mars exploration?
